title: toxicodendron erosum
intro: Toxicodendron erosum, also known as the poison tree or poison sumac, is a type of flowering plant in the Anacardiaceae family that is native to parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Toxicodendron erosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's resin is often extracted and used to make tinctures, salves, and creams that can be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
